props.ChoiceText: Your almanac passed from hand to hand far beyond the circle you intended, and with every copy your name became harder to control.
props.ChoiceBio: An almanac in demand made your calculations a public commodity.

0.TransitionText: Because an almanac in demand made your calculations a public commodity, number, omen, and the heavens still held your attention.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Astrologer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because an almanac in demand made your calculations a public commodity, counsel and prediction brought you closer to powerful households.
1.TransitionPrompt: Your growing fame could draw you closer to powerful households, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because an almanac in demand made your calculations a public commodity, your star-lore bent your fate another way.
2.TransitionPrompt: Your work could bend your fate toward trade and bargaining, but you may remain on your current path instead.
